Package org.eventb.internal.pp.loader.formula

Class AbstractFormula<T extends LiteralDescriptor>

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.pp.loader.formula.AbstractFormula<T>
Direct Known Subclasses:
AbstractLabelizableFormula, AbstractSingleFormula
public abstract class AbstractFormula<T extends LiteralDescriptor> extends Object
Abstract class for formulas that have a term index.
